---
title: "Figure 5 — sample-distortion collapse on the FAILING method (macro_NR): inverse total emission variance"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
The collapse variable x_B = 1/(N*Delta + W*noise/Delta) = 1/sigma^2_tot is the inverse total per-sample
emission variance (verified: sigma^2_inst = Current_Noise/Delta, N-independent; sigma^2_chan ~ N*Delta gating).
On macro_IR the distortion is ~1 so the collapse only reaches R^2~0.3-0.76 (tiny signal). Here we run the SAME
variable on macro_NR, the method that fails: its sample distortion spans 1 -> 100s, huge SNR, so if the balance
is the right physics the curves across all N_ch and all noise should fall on ONE curve per parameter.
Numeric run 433ed13, Likelihood_Sample_Distortion diagonal. W scanned for the best per-param collapse.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r data}
ALGO     <- "NR"
SAMP     <- "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Sample_Distortion"
NOISES   <- c("0.1", "1", "10")
W        <- 10                                    # instrument weight (scanned below)
PIDX     <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB<- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]",
              unitary_current = "log[10]~i", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")

read_noise <- function(z) map_dfr(Sys.glob(sprintf(
  "../data/433ed13/figure_3_nch_*_nsim_10000_macro_%s_noise_%s_battery_pool.csv", ALGO, z)),
  ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)) %>% mutate(noise = z)
d <- map_dfr(NOISES, read_noise) %>%
  filter(component_path == SAMP, statistic == "value", probit == "mean",
         param_index == param_col, param_index %in% PIDX) %>%
  mutate(param_name = names(PIDX)[match(param_index, PIDX)], nz = as.numeric(noise)) %>%
  group_by(param_name, noise, nz, Num_ch, interval_in_tau) %>%
  summarise(D = mean(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(D), D > 0) %>%
  mutate(x_B = 1 / (Num_ch * interval_in_tau + W * nz / interval_in_tau),
         nch_f  = factor(Num_ch),
         noisef = factor(paste("noise", noise), levels = paste("noise", NOISES)),
         param  = factor(param_name, levels = names(PIDX), labels = unname(PARAM_LAB)))
```

```{r r2-scan}
r2 <- function(v, y) {
  b  <- cut(v, 18); w <- tibble(b, y) %>% group_by(b) %>%
    summarise(vv = var(y), n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>% filter(n > 2)
  1 - weighted.mean(w$vv, w$n, na.rm = TRUE) / var(y)
}
Ws  <- c(1, 3, 10, 30, 100)
res <- map_dfr(unique(d$param_name), function(p) {
  df <- d %>% filter(param_name == p)
  tibble(param = p, W = Ws, R2 = sapply(Ws, function(w)
    round(r2(log10(1 / (df$Num_ch * df$interval_in_tau + w * df$nz / df$interval_in_tau)), log10(df$D)), 3)))
})
cat("collapse R^2 of log10(sample distortion) vs log10(x_B), macro_NR, per param, over W:\n")
res %>% pivot_wider(names_from = W, values_from = R2) %>% as.data.frame() %>% print()
cat("\nbest W per param:\n")
res %>% group_by(param) %>% slice_max(R2, n = 1) %>% as.data.frame() %>% print()
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 7.5, fig.height = 7.5}
g <- ggplot(d, aes(x_B, D, colour = nch_f, shape = noisef, group = interaction(nch_f, noise))) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, colour = "grey45", linewidth = .3, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(linewidth = .3, alpha = .5) + geom_point(size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ param, nrow = 2, scales = "free", labeller = label_parsed) +
  scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(name = expression(N[ch]), end = .92, direction = -1) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17, 15), name = NULL) +
  labs(x = expression(x[B]==1 / (N[ch] %.% Delta + W %.% noise / Delta)~"  (inverse total emission variance)"),
       y = "sample distortion (macro_NR, diagonal)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9, base_family = "Helvetica") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "right",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7), axis.title = element_text(size = 8.5),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 8.5))
g
ggsave("Figure_5_NR_sample_collapse.pdf", g, width = 7.5, height = 7.5)
```
